name: The Walking Dead
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on assistants owned.
formula: +(ln(1 + x) ^ 1.75)%, where x is assistants owned

name: Deadened Muscles
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Necropolises built this Reincarnation.
formula: (4 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is highest Necropolises this Reincarnation

name: Death Temples
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively based on highest Necropolises built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(x ^ 0.3), where x is highest Necropolises this Reincarnation

name: Unholy Rituals
effect: Increase offline production based on time spent offline this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.4 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is offline time this Reincarnation

name: Corpse Supply
effect: Gain assistants based on time spent offline this Reincarnation.
formula: +(0.4 * x ^ 0.6), where x is offline time this Reincarnation

name: Plagued Buildings
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent this Era.
formula: (0.75 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is time this Era

name: Tireless Workers
effect: Increase the production of assistants by 1500%.

name: Undead Resilience
effect: Increases offline production based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (125 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2.5)%, where x is Mana Regeneration

name: Flesh Servants
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on highest Flesh Workshops built this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.3 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is highest Flesh Workshops this Reincarnation

name: Eternal Servitude
effect: Increase production of Unique buildings based on time spent this Era.
formula: (x ^ 0.7)%, where x is time this Era

name: Zombie Apocalypse
effect: Gain assistants additively based on total offline time this Reincarnation.
formula: +(21 * x ^ 0.7), where x is offline time this Reincarnation
